title: Vanilla+ Evolved
description: This modpack upgrades vanilla Minecraft with better visuals, smoother performance, and small tweaks that make the game feel fresh but still classic.
body:
--- ##
🌿 Vanilla+ Evolved

The next evolution of vanilla — refined, immersive, and beautifully optimized.

--- ## ✨ **Overview** **Vanilla+ Evolved** is a carefully curated modpack designed to expand and refine the Minecraft experience — without losing the essence of vanilla gameplay. Every addition enhances exploration, performance, visuals, and quality of life while keeping the world balanced, familiar, and deeply immersive. --- ## 🌍 **World & Exploration** Discover breathtaking landscapes powered by **Biomes O' Plenty** and **Beautify: Refabricated**, enhanced with ambient effects like **Falling Leaves**, **Presence Footsteps**, and **Sound Physics Remastered**. Teleport across your world using **Waystones**, explore custom structures and villages from **Charm**, and enjoy subtle environmental details that make exploration feel alive. --- ## ⚙️ **Gameplay & Progression** Enjoy seamless progression with **Farmer’s Delight Refabricated**, **Origins**, and **Sophisticated Storage** (Unofficial Fabric ports). Experience the legendary **Create (v0.6)** — bringing new kinetic contraptions, mechanics, and automation possibilities to Fabric for the first time at this scale. --- ## 💡 **Quality of Life** Streamlined inventory management with **Mouse Tweaks**, **Inventory Sorting**, and **Stack Refill**. Enhanced UI and information with **EMI** and its full suite of integrations (**EMI Enchants**, **EMI Loot**, **EMI Trades**, and more). Subtle upgrades like **ToolTipFix**, **AppleSkin**, and **Charm of Undying** make the survival experience smoother than ever. --- ## 🧱 **Visuals & Atmosphere** A modern visual overhaul with **Continuity**, **Entity Model Features (EMF)**, **Entity Texture Features (ETF)**, and **Dynamic Crosshair**. Compatible with **Iris Shaders** for full shader support — perfect when paired with performance mods like **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **Starlight**, and **ModernFix**. --- ## ⚡ **Performance Optimized** This pack is tuned for both beauty *and* speed. With **FerriteCore**, **Krypton**, **ImmediatelyFast**, **BadOptimizations**, and **LazyDFU**, even heavily modded worlds run smoothly and load fast. Small tweaks like **FastQuit** and **No Telemetry** keep everything lightweight and frustration-free. --- ## 🎯 **The Goal** To create a version of Minecraft that feels *exactly how it should*: - 🌅 Visually stunning - 🎧 Immersive and atmospheric - ⚙️ Technically optimized - ❤️ Deep, but still unmistakably *vanilla* --- > ⚠️ **Server Users:** > This modpack has been designed for singleplayer and has not been tested on a server. It may work on a server as it is or with some minor tweaks, so feel free to try! ---

“Vanilla+ Evolved — the way Minecraft was always meant to feel.” 🌾
